## Design doc

- [ ] **Updated `Documentation/DESIGN.md`** if this PR changes any of:
  - Architecture or a major component (§2)
  - Adds / removes / replaces a dependency (§3)
  - Adds / changes a table or column (§4)
  - Adds / removes / replaces a tool exposed to the agent (§2 Tools table)
  - Makes a non-obvious design decision worth defending later (§5 Decision log)
  - Adds / changes a background task or operational concern (§6)

If the box above is unchecked because none of the bullets apply, note that here:

> _Not applicable: <reason>_
